message:
fix: Resolve all linter and TypeScript errors across packages

- edit-distance.ts: Prefix unused wasmReady with underscore (placeholder for WASM)
- store.ts: Add 'synteny' to OverlayData type union
- ComparisonOverlay.tsx: Remove unnecessary type:'module' option from Bun Worker
  (Bun handles TypeScript/ESM automatically)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,7 +30,8 @@ type OverlayData = Partial<Record<
   | 'anomaly'
   | 'dotPlot'
   | 'cgr'
-  | 'non-b-dna',
+  | 'non-b-dna'
+  | 'synteny',
   unknown>>;
 
 // Overlay states
